title: Updated Shareholder Portal!
summary: Koniag’s Shareholder portal, is a free online resource that provides Shareholders easy access to a wealth of information. title: February 2019 Back Page — Evan Newman is retiring!
summary: Holy Cross is one of AVEC’s smaller communities with a population of 155 in a beautiful area in the Yukon-Koyukuk district. The Newman family has lived in Holy Cross for generations and Evan has been a power plant operator for at least 35 years. When he hangs up his hat in early February, I am quite...
